violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item was prepared in unapproved space in the kitchen in the Bar.
Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food - Lettuce found below raw hamburger.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - Wet cloth found without sanitizer made--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. - Scoop handle found in the flour.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. - Taco meat found thawing on counter.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Items throughout found without dates.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. - Food containers found cracked.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Prep cooler, reach-in needs to be cleaned.
Plumbing system. — --- Grey water hose was being drained on the ground.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. - Screen door needs repair. - Flies throughout the food trailer.

Prohibiting animals. — --Live animal on premises was not kept/housed in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. - Cat items found inside in the unapproved kitchen
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
